nasb.text: You shall build the altar of the Lord your God of uncut stones, and you shall offer on it burnt offerings to the Lord your God;

esv.text: you shall build an altar to the Lord your God of uncut stones. And you shall offer burnt offerings on it to the Lord your God,

cnv.text: 你要用沒有鑿過的整塊石頭築耶和華你的　神的壇；在壇上你要獻上燔祭給耶和華你的　神；

ccb.text: 要用未凿过的石头为你们的上帝耶和华筑一座坛，在上面献燔祭给祂；
